creator: tmseck@netcologne.de
text:
- Update to snapshot r5917, published 2007-06-22.
- Not only compile but install the FLTK2 demos and example applications.
- Implement a new option "FLTK_EXAMPLES" that defaults to "on".
  Disabling this option will keep the port from compiling and installing
  abovementioned FLTK2 examples. The port obeys NOPORTEXAMPLES and gives
  priority to this global setting.

Added files:

files/extra-patch-Makefile

Fix: Apply this patch:
